changes: Click handler: btn.classList.add('card-option-selected') immediately on click
hideCard() + resolve(index) deferred 200ms via setTimeout (was immediate)
CSS .card-option-selected added to index.html: background rgba(201,168,76,0.3), border-color #c9a84c, transition:none
Sets fill.style.animation = 'none' and fill.style.width = '100%' before resolve()
Guards: only runs when fill element is present (null-safe)
